listing.shortDescription: On-chain governance for DAOs — propose, vote, execute on Polygon.
listing.fullDescription:
GOVDAO is a mobile-first governance platform for member-led organizations. Every proposal, vote, and treasury action is secured by five smart contracts deployed on Polygon mainnet — no backend, no middleman, just transparent on-chain governance in your pocket.

🏛 GOVERNANCE MADE SIMPLE
Create and vote on proposals directly from your phone. GOVDAO supports both on-chain votes (finalized on Polygon) and off-chain deliberation, giving your organization the flexibility to deliberate before committing gas.

💰 TREASURY TRANSPARENCY
Monitor your DAO's treasury balance and movement history in real time. Every outgoing transfer is queued through a timelock — giving members time to react before funds move.

🔔 STAY INFORMED
Governance reminders keep you ahead of quorum deadlines and voting windows. Push notifications fire when proposals enter their voting phase or approach execution.

🛡 EMERGENCY GUARDIAN
Schedule and run guardian drills so your emergency multisig is always battle-ready. When governance needs a circuit breaker, the guardian is there.

📊 ANALYTICS & INSIGHTS (Premium)
Delegate power maps, proposal risk scoring, sentiment pulse, and participation heatmaps — the full analytics suite for serious governance operators.

🚀 DEPLOY WIZARD (Premium)
Deploy the full five-contract governance kernel directly from the app. Configure your DAO's voting delay, quorum, timelock period, and member registry in a guided step-by-step wizard.

🔐 SECURE BY DESIGN
• Your wallet never leaves your device — GOVDAO connects via WalletConnect or Coinbase Wallet
• Biometric confirmation for sensitive actions
• No personal data collected or stored
• Privacy policy: https://photon-bounce.com/govdao/privacy.html

📱 FREE & PREMIUM
Core governance (proposals, voting, treasury, activity) is free. Upgrade to Premium to unlock analytics, guardian drills, member invite with timelock, delegate maps, risk analysis, and the deploy wizard.

Built on Polygon · Open source on GitHub · Coming to Google Play
